generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for environmental monitoring of temperature in building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for occupancy monitoring in building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for light level monitoring in building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics, EnergyOptimization, InteractiveVisualization
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualization
]

instance BIMSoftware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM software for modeling and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables Simulation
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based model enriched with device metadata and control logic for building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMSoftware, Ditto
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems for operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeTemperatureInsight, RealTimeOccupancyInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionReductionInsight, MaintenancePlanningInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization service for reducing consumption"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionReductionInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization service using Unreal Engine 5 for performance analysis and decision support"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalysisInsight, DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance Simulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation service for performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance EnergyConsumptionReductionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for reducing energy consumption through predictive analytics"
]

instance MaintenancePlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for proactive maintenance planning based on system states"
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring insight"
]

instance RealTimeOccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy monitoring insight"
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for analyzing building performance metrics"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing decision support for facility managers"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from simulation results for operational planning"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting control in building systems"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for HVAC system control in building systems"
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain, specifically a Living Lab case study serving as physical counterpart for real-time monitoring and optimization"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightLevelSensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator
]

instance ModularArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with service-oriented components extendable via standardized interfaces"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the digital twin and sent via Hono/Ditto to actuators in physical building systems, such as adjusting lighting or HVAC settings based on simulation results and optimization algorithms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange, though specific time intervals (e.g., milliseconds or seconds) are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An integrated system comprising BIM models as the semantic foundation, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and modular services connected through standardized extension points."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life cycle stages from design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, as BIM enables comprehensive representation across the entire building life cycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure alignment between the digital twin and physical counterpart, though specific verification methods beyond ODTE are not detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional data exchange; Hono typically utilizes MQTT for IoT communication protocols."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Not specified; open-source tools (Hono, Ditto, Unreal Engine) can be deployed on various infrastructures, but details are not provided in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points support integration with external systems, though specific examples of integrated external systems are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards for semantic modeling and interoperability, with framework-specific standardized extension points for modular service integration."
]
